title.en: Fractured Monolith in the Digital Void

description.ko: 완벽한 질서가 혼돈의 기하학적 파편으로 격렬하게 해체되는 과정을 형상화한 작품.
description.en: A representation of perfect order being violently dismantled into chaotic geometric fragments.

prompt: A brutalist #1A1A1A obsidian monolith of KURO-X undergoing a violent geometric deconstruction in a clinical #FFFFFF digital vacuum. Sharp, recursive #808080 shards and #C0C0C0 pixel-sorted glitches are frozen in mid-explosion. High-contrast cinematic lighting reveals razor-sharp raytraced reflections, intense chromatic aberration, and digital scanlines. 8k resolution, Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, precise mathematical chaos.
